categories.label: Delivery Victory Points
categories.description: VPs earned from delivering goods cubes during the game

categories.label: Completed Links
categories.description: 1 VP per completed link you own at end of game

categories.label: Income Conversion
categories.description: Positive income: +1 VP per 2 income (round down). Negative income: -2 VP per 1 negative income point

categories.label: VP Penalties
categories.description: VPs lost from raising money at -10 income (-2 VP per $5 raised)
